title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at LG Soft India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at LG Soft India
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
